text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 
70 
GAP_DAYS_MONPP_OS 
LABEL: 
Gap Mail Order Non-Preferred Pharmacy — days in other days’ supply 
DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the number of days in an "other" day’s supply of the drugs (other than 1- or 3- 
months) on this tier, when using mail order non-preferred pharmacy (MONPP) during the coverage 
gap phase of the Part D benefit. 
SHORT NAME: — 
LONG NAME:
